back_translation: Now the heads of the fathers of the Levites drew near to Eleazar the priest and to Joshua son of Nun, and to the heads of the fathers of the tribes of the sons of Israel.
And they spoke to them at Shiloh in the land of Canaan, saying, 'The LORD commanded by the hand of Moses to give to us cities to dwell in, and their pasturelands for our livestock.'
So the sons of Israel gave to the Levites, out of their inheritance, according to the mouth (command) of the LORD, these cities and their pasturelands.

And the lot came out for the clans of the Kohathite. The sons of Aaron the priest from the Levites received by lot, from the tribe of Judah and from the tribe of the Simeonite and from the tribe of Benjamin, thirteen cities.
And for the remaining sons of Kohath, from the clans of the tribe of Ephraim and from the tribe of Dan and from the half-tribe of Manasseh, by lot ten cities.
And for the sons of Gershon, from the clans of the tribe of Issachar and from the tribe of Asher and from the tribe of Naphtali and from the half-tribe of Manasseh in Bashan, by lot thirteen cities.
For the sons of Merari according to their clans, from the tribe of Reuben and from the tribe of Gad and from the tribe of Zebulun, twelve cities.
So the sons of Israel gave to the Levites these cities and their pasturelands, as the LORD had commanded by the hand of Moses, by lot.
They gave from the tribe of the sons of Judah and from the tribe of the sons of Simeon these cities which are designated by name.
And it was for the sons of Aaron, from the clans of the Kohathite from the sons of Levi, because the first lot was theirs.
And they gave to them Kiriath-arba (the father of Anak) — that is, Hebron — in the hill country of Judah, with its pasturelands around it.
But the field of the city and its villages they had given to Caleb son of Jephunneh as his possession.
And to the sons of Aaron the priest they gave the city of refuge for the manslayer — Hebron and its pasturelands — and Libnah and its pasturelands,
and Jattir and its pasturelands, and Eshtemoa and its pasturelands,
and Holon and its pasturelands, and Debir and its pasturelands,
and Ain and its pasturelands, and Juttah and its pasturelands, Beth-shemesh and its pasturelands — nine cities from these two tribes.
And from the tribe of Benjamin: Gibeon and its pasturelands, Geba and its pasturelands,
Anathoth and its pasturelands, and Almon and its pasturelands — four cities.
All the cities of the sons of Aaron the priests — thirteen cities and their pasturelands.
And for the clans of the sons of Kohath, the Levites remaining from the sons of Kohath: the cities of their lot were from the tribe of Ephraim.
And they gave to them the city of refuge for the manslayer — Shechem and its pasturelands — in the hill country of Ephraim, and Gezer and its pasturelands,
and Kibzaim and its pasturelands, and Beth-horon and its pasturelands — four cities.
And from the tribe of Dan: Elteke and its pasturelands, Gibbethon and its pasturelands,
Aijalon and its pasturelands, Gath-rimmon and its pasturelands — four cities.
And from the half-tribe of Manasseh: Taanach and its pasturelands, and Gath-rimmon and its pasturelands — two cities.
All the cities, ten, and their pasturelands, for the clans of the remaining sons of Kohath.

And for the sons of Gershon from the clans of the Levites: from the half-tribe of Manasseh, the city of refuge for the manslayer — Golan in Bashan and its pasturelands — and Beeshterah and its pasturelands — two cities.
And from the tribe of Issachar: Kishion and its pasturelands, Daberath and its pasturelands,
Jarmuth and its pasturelands, En-gannim and its pasturelands — four cities.
And from the tribe of Asher: Mishal and its pasturelands, Abdon and its pasturelands,
Helkath and its pasturelands, and Rehob and its pasturelands — four cities.
And from the tribe of Naphtali: the city of refuge for the manslayer — Kedesh in Galilee and its pasturelands — and Hammoth-dor and its pasturelands, and Kartan and its pasturelands — three cities.
All the cities of the Gershonites according to their clans — thirteen cities and their pasturelands.
And for the clans of the sons of Merari, the remaining Levites: from the tribe of Zebulun, Jokneam and its pasturelands, Kartah and its pasturelands,
Dimnah and its pasturelands, Nahalal and its pasturelands — four cities.
And from the tribe of Reuben: Bezer and its pasturelands, and Jahaz and its pasturelands,
Kedemoth and its pasturelands, and Mephaath and its pasturelands — four cities.
And from the tribe of Gad: the city of refuge for the manslayer — Ramoth in Gilead and its pasturelands — and Mahanaim and its pasturelands,
Heshbon and its pasturelands, Jazer and its pasturelands — four cities in all.
All the cities for the sons of Merari according to their clans, the rest from the clans of the Levites; and their lot was twelve cities.
All the cities of the Levites in the midst of the possession of the sons of Israel — forty-eight cities and their pasturelands.
These cities shall be: city by city, and its pasturelands around it. So it is for all these cities.
Thus the LORD gave to Israel all the land which He had sworn to give to their fathers; and they took possession of it and dwelt in it.
And the LORD gave them rest on every side, according to all that He had sworn to their fathers. And no man stood before them from all their enemies; all their enemies the LORD gave into their hand.
Not one word fell from all the good word which the LORD had spoken to the house of Israel — everything came (was fulfilled).
